messages.noStandingInProtection: &cYou are not standing inside a protection.
messages.notOwner: &cYou are not the owner of this protection stone.
messages.blockBreakDisabled: &cBlock breaking is disabled here for non-members.
messages.blockPlaceDisabled: &cBlock placing is disabled here for non-members.
messages.containerAccessDisabled: &cContainer access is disabled here for non-members.
messages.enderpearlDisabled: &cEnder pearls are disabled in this area.
messages.liquidPlaceDisabled: &cPlacing liquids is disabled here for non-members.
messages.entityAttackDisabled: &cAttacking entities is disabled here for non-members.
messages.entityInteractDisabled: &cInteracting with entities is disabled here for non-members.
messages.tntDisabled: &cTNT detonation is disabled in this area.
messages.centerBlockDeleteHint: &cPlease use &e/cb delete&c or the management interface to remove this claim.
messages.nameAlreadyExists: &cA protection with that name already exists.
messages.enterTitlePrompt: &eEnter the main title in chat. Use '&' for colors.
messages.enterRenamePrompt: &eEnter the new name for the protection in chat.
messages.memberAdded: '%s' has been added to the protection.
messages.alreadyMember: '%s' is already a member of this protection.
messages.cannotAddSelf: &eYou cannot add yourself as a member.
messages.noPermissionEdit: &cYou don't have permission to edit this protection.
messages.teleportNoPermission: &cYou do not have permission to teleport.
messages.overlapping: Your %s protection (R%d) overlaps with the existing '%s'.
messages.overlappingGeneric: This protection stone overlaps with another nearby area.
messages.airPlacement: &cYou cannot place a protection stone in the air.
messages.spaceBlocked: &cYou cannot place a protection stone here, the space is blocked.
messages.insideAnotherZone: &cOperation denied: Overlapping with an existing protected sequence.
messages.moduleHidden: The protection module has been hidden.

gui.manageProtectionsLore: &7Overview and configuration of your authorized zones.
gui.discordChatPrompt: &eClick here to join the support Discord:
gui.hideLore: &7If you hide the module, it will be physically removed.\n&7You will NOT be able to see it again.\n&7Management and deletion MUST be done via this menu.

lore.stoneLore: &7Deploy this module to establish a &f%s &7security perimeter.
